title: tabernaemontana balansae var. macrophylla
intro: Tabernaemontana balansae var. macrophylla, commonly known as the giant tabernaemontana, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial activities. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana balansae var. macrophylla include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing the leaves in water or oil to create teas, infusions, or topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
